The '''Acherin''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to the planet [[Acherin]]. During the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] subjugation of the planet, the term was also used to describe anyone who supported the freedom of the planet.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Dark Warning]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Return of the Dark Side]]''
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Secret Weapon]]''
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Reckoning]]''
